title: allantodia heterocarpa
intro: Allantodia heterocarpa is a species of fern within the genus Allantodia, a type of plant that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae and order Polypodiales. It is primarily found in Southeast Asia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Allantodia heterocarpa include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, cough, and rheumatism, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Allantodia heterocarpa typically involve drying and powdering the plant, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
